mapper.select: SELECT MAX(FAC_CODE) FROM tb_fac WHERE FAC_CODE REGEXP '^F[0-9]+$'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_fac
AND FAC_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{kwFacName},'%')
AND FAC_NO LIKE CONCAT('%',#{kwFacNo},'%')
AND FAC_GUBN = #{kwFacGubn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_fac ( FAC_CODE, FAC_NO, FAC_NAME, FAC_GYU, FAC_HYUN, FAC_YONG, FAC_MAN1, FAC_MAN2, FAC_PLC, FAC_MAKE, FAC_CBUY, FAC_BUY, FAC_MDAY, FAC_MON, FAC_ABLE, FAC_TIME, FAC_TEST, FAC_BIGO, TECH_NO, FAC_GUBN, FAC_E1, FAC_E2, FAC_E3, FAC_E4, FAC_LOT, FAC_DAN, FAC_UNUS, FAC_CAU, FAC_PDA_USE, FAC_STATE, FAC_FILE_NAME ) VALUES ( #{fac_code}, #{fac_no}, #{fac_name}, #{fac_gyu}, #{fac_hyun}, #{fac_yong}, #{fac_man1}, #{fac_man2}, #{fac_plc}, #{fac_make}, #{fac_cbuy}, #{fac_buy}, #{fac_mday}, #{fac_mon}, #{fac_able}, #{fac_time}, #{fac_test}, #{fac_bigo}, #{tech_no}, #{fac_gubn}, #{fac_e1}, #{fac_e2}, #{fac_e3}, #{fac_e4}, #{fac_lot}, #{fac_dan}, #{fac_unus}, #{fac_cau}, #{fac_pda_use}, #{fac_state}, #{fac_file_name} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_fac SET FAC_NO=#{fac_no}, FAC_NAME=#{fac_name}, FAC_GYU=#{fac_gyu}, FAC_HYUN=#{fac_hyun}, FAC_YONG=#{fac_yong}, FAC_MAN1=#{fac_man1}, FAC_MAN2=#{fac_man2}, FAC_PLC=#{fac_plc}, FAC_MAKE=#{fac_make}, FAC_CBUY=#{fac_cbuy}, FAC_BUY=#{fac_buy}, FAC_MDAY=#{fac_mday}, FAC_MON=#{fac_mon}, FAC_ABLE=#{fac_able}, FAC_TIME=#{fac_time}, FAC_TEST=#{fac_test}, FAC_BIGO=#{fac_bigo}, TECH_NO=#{tech_no}, FAC_GUBN=#{fac_gubn}, FAC_E1=#{fac_e1}, FAC_E2=#{fac_e2}, FAC_E3=#{fac_e3}, FAC_E4=#{fac_e4}, FAC_LOT=#{fac_lot}, FAC_DAN=#{fac_dan}, FAC_UNUS=#{fac_unus}, FAC_CAU=#{fac_cau}, FAC_PDA_USE=#{fac_pda_use}, FAC_STATE=#{fac_state}, FAC_FILE_NAME=#{fac_file_name} WHERE FAC_CODE = #{fac_code}
